query_result.reasoning:
It seems Meta no longer discloses monthly active users - they switched to Daily Active People (DAP). Let me search more carefully. Previously, Facebook used to disclose MAU (Monthly Active Users). In more recent filings, Meta reports "Family Daily Active People" (DAP) rather than MAUs. Let me check if there's a "Monthly Active People" (MAP) figure anywhere in the filing.

Let me also check if maybe the question is referring to older data or a specific part of the filing. Let me look more carefully.

tool_calls.name: retrieve_information
tool_calls.args: {"prompt": "In the Meta 10-K filing {{meta_10k_fy2025}}, search for any mention of \"monthly\" metrics including \"monthly active people\" or \"Family monthly active people\" or \"monthly active users\". Also look for any ARPP or revenue per user metrics. Check all tables in the MD&A section that show user engagement metrics. Look specifically for any mention of \"3.58 billion\" or other monthly figures near that scale."}

tool_output.output:
# Search Results: Monthly Metrics, ARPP, and User Engagement in Meta's 10-K

## 1. Monthly Metrics Search

**No monthly metrics found.** The provided excerpts from Meta's 10-K filing contain **no mention** of:
- "Monthly active people"
- "Family monthly active people"  
- "Monthly active users" (MAP/MAU)

Meta appears to have transitioned exclusively to **Daily Active People (DAP)** as its primary user engagement metric, moving away from monthly reporting.

---

## 2. ARPP (Average Revenue Per Person) Metrics Found

### Definition
> "We define ARPP as our FoA revenue during a given quarter, divided by the average of the number of DAP at the beginning and end of the quarter."

### Quarterly ARPP Data Table
| Period | Q1 2023 | Q2 2023 | Q3 2023 | Q4 2023 | Q1 2024 | Q2 2024 | Q3 2024 | Q4 2024 | Q1 2025 |
|--------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| **ARPP** | $12.33 | $11.20 | $11.89 | $12.29 | $14.25 | $12.36 | $13.65 | $14.46 | $16.56 |

### Annual ARPP
> "Our annual worldwide ARPP in 2025, which represents the sum of quarterly ARPP during such period, was **$57.03**, an increase of **15%** from 2024."

### Definition Update Note
> "We updated our definition of ARPP beginning in the first quarter of 2024 and have recast ARPP in prior periods for comparative purposes."

---

## 3. MD&A Tables - User Engagement Metrics

The MD&A consolidated statements of income table shows financial data but **not user engagement metrics directly**:

| Line Item | 2025 | 2024 | 2023 |
|-----------|------|------|------|
| Revenue | $200,966M | $164,501M | $134,902M |
| Net Income | $60,458M | $62,360M | $39,098M |

User engagement metrics (DAP, ad impressions) are presented in the **Preamble/Key Metrics** section rather than in traditional MD&A tables.

---

## 4. Mentions of "3.58 Billion" and Related Figures

The figure **3.58 billion** appears exclusively as a **Daily Active People (DAP)** metric, not monthly:

| Metric | Value | Context |
|--------|-------|---------|
| **DAP (December 2025)** | 3.58 billion | Average for December 2025 |
| **DAP (December 2024)** | 3.35 billion | Prior year comparison |
| **DAP Growth** | 7% | Year-over-year increase |

### Exact Quotes
> "Worldwide DAP increased 7% to **3.58 billion** on average during December 2025 from 3.35 billion during December 2024."

> "Family daily active people (DAP) was **3.58 billion** on average for December 2025, an increase of 7% year-over-year."

---

## Summary

| Search Criteria | Result |
|----------------|--------|
| Monthly active people/users | ❌ Not found |
| ARPP definitions & data | ✅ Quarterly + Annual data found |
| MD&A engagement tables | ⚠️ Financial data only; engagement in Preamble |
| "3.58 billion" | ✅ DAP metric (daily, not monthly) |

**Key Insight:** Meta's 10-K uses **Daily Active People (DAP)** rather than monthly metrics, with the 3.58 billion figure representing average daily users in December 2025.
